PMC5508045.sentence: Genotypes AC + CC of rs1057910 are associated with decreased dose of warfarin as compared to genotype AA.
citations: The patients with variant genotypes of VKORC1 − 1639G > A required significantly lower warfarin stable weekly doses (SWDs) than those with wild-type genotype (p < 0.001).
Patients with AA and GA genotypes of VKORC1 − 1639G > A required 49.7% and 27.7% significantly lower averages of SWDS of warfarin as compared with those with wild-type GG genotype (p < 0.001).

PMC5508045.sentence: Genotypes AA + AG of rs8175347 are associated with increased dose of warfarin as compared to genotype GG.
citations: The patients with CYP2C9*3 variant allele required significantly lower warfarin SWDs than those with homozygous wild-type (p = 0.006).
The warfarin SWDs were decreased by 7.9 mg and 25.9 mg in the patients with CYP2C9 *1/*3* and *CYP2C9 *3/*3* genotypes as compared with those with wild-type *1/*1* genotype (p < 0.001).
